title: Enteekateeka
subtitle: Enteekateeka z'okulaga n'emirimu egy'enkalakkalira ku gateway.
languageDescription: Londa olulimi lw'ono browser. Olulimi oluterekeddwa lukyakozesa enteekateeka ya i18next eriwo.
appearanceDescription: Dark mode esooka kukyusa ekitundu ekikulu eky'app. Ebifaananyi bya data bisigala ku langi zaabyo enjeru mu mutendera guno.
autoRefreshDescription: Kikyusa kuphela engeri dashboard gy'ezzaamu obuggya mu browser eno. Tekikyusa budde bwa sensor uplink oba cadence ya scheduler w'okufukirira.
